title: Savory Creamy Ethiopian Macaroni Stir-fry
description: A savory and creamy weeknight dish featuring macaroni in a flavorful poached sauce that is both jain-friendly and suitable for those with dairy allergies.
instructions: Bring vegetable broth to a simmer in a pot. Add salt and pepper.
In a separate pan, heat olive oil over medium heat. Sauté garlic, onion, and bell pepper until softened.
Stir in tomato paste and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly to prevent sticking.
Add macaroni to the pot of simmering broth, cover, and let it poach for about 8-10 minutes or until al dente.
Gently fold cooked pasta into the sauce. Cook for another 3-5 minutes to allow flavors to meld together.
Season with salt and pepper to taste before serving.
